de-h-armee-8.notes: Second formation (from Armeeabteilung Kempf, Aug 1943); the 1939 8. Armee is a separate incarnation, not yet authored. Sector-simulation scaffold.

de-h-pzarmee-2.notes: Identity scaffold for the Eastern Front sector simulation (renamed from Panzergruppe, Jan 1942).

su-front-don.notes: Scaffold (no positions yet). Rokossovsky; conducted Operation Ring.

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014
